person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Add a new HTTP PUT endpoint to allow updating existing person records.
person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.human_impl: @PutMapping public Person update(@RequestBody Person person) { return repository.save(person); }

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Replace manual DynamicPropertySource configuration with the @ServiceConnection annotation to automatically bind Testcontainers to Spring Boot properties.
person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.human_impl: Added @ServiceConnection to PostgreSQLContainer and removed the registerMySQLProperties method.

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Re-enable a previously commented-out test method to restore test coverage.
person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.human_impl: Uncommented @Test and @Order(3) annotations on the getAll method.

caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Lombok dependency to version 1.18.32 to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
Update Hoverfly Java JUnit5 dependency to version 0.17.1.
Update Jib Maven Plugin to version 3.4.2.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update testcontainers version to 1.19.7 to align with newer Java 21 compatibility and features.
Update Lombok version to 1.18.32 for bug fixes and potential Java 21 improvements.
Update Instancio JUnit version to 4.5.0 to leverage major version features and Java 21 support.
Add spring-boot-testcontainers dependency to enable native Spring Boot test container support.
Update Jib Maven Plugin to 3.4.2 for better container image building capabilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 2.4.2 to 3.2.4 to align with Java 21 compatibility and modern Spring ecosystem.
Change the Maven Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the CI environment from Java 19 to Java 21 to match the target runtime.
.circleci/config.yml.human_impl: Changed docker image from 'cimg/openjdk:19.0' to 'cimg/openjdk:21.0.2' and installed openjdk-21-jdk in the test job.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Remove the testcontainers-cloud-orb dependency and its associated setup steps from the CI configuration.
.circleci/config.yml.human_impl: Removed 'tcc' orb import, 'tcc/setup' pre-step, and 'Testcontainers' context from the workflow.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Switch the test job from a Docker-based executor to a machine executor to support native Java installation and potentially Docker-in-Docker requirements.
.circleci/config.yml.human_impl: Defined 'machine_executor_amd64' using 'ubuntu-2204' and assigned it to the 'test' job.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Refactor the test job from using a Maven orb to a custom job definition with explicit steps.
.circleci/config.yml.human_impl: Replaced 'maven/test' orb usage with a custom 'test' job containing checkout, Java installation, and 'mvn test' steps.
